title: Diamond's Shiny Mobs
description: Like shiny pokemon but for Minecraft mobs!
body:
## Requires Entity Texture Features (or optifine) to work❗
Adds a 1/2048 chance for every mob (excluding the tadpole and tropical fish) to be a different color.\
If you thought pink sheep weren't rare enough then here you go.

This project is highly inspired by ludojeu115's resourcepack which you can find here:\
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/shiny-mobs

I will add images of all shinies to the gallery at some point\
always blame the horses
## Do mobs stay shiny:
### After being struck by lightning:
- pig ❌
- villager ❌
- mooshroom ✅
- creeper ✅ (also has a unique armor texture)
### After zombification:
- villager ❌
- piglin ❌
- piglin brute ❌
- hoglin ❌
### After unique interactions:
- being put in a bucket (all fish and axolotls) ❌
- creaking despawn/respawn ❌ (do not ask why it's a 1/2 chance, i might be stupid)
- tadpole growing up ❌ (which is why it has no shiny)
- zombie drowning, skeleton freezing ❌
- interacting with a dye (sheep, wolf) ✅
- name easter egg (eg. Toast) ✅
- ghastling growing up into a happy ghast ✅
- goat losing a horn ✅
